title: hypericum boehlingraabei
intro: Hypericum boehlingraabei, also known as St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Hypericum genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the reuptake of serotonin, dopamine, and norepinephrine, which can help to alleviate symptoms of mild to moderate depression and anxiety. The health benefits of Hypericum boehlingraabei include its potential to reduce stress, improve mood, and promote better sleep, as well as its antiviral and antibacterial properties. Hypericum boehlingraabei is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be applied topically to the skin to treat wounds and burns.
